name: animated-input
title: Animated Input
author: Parable
description: A text field with a spring floating label that rises on focus/fill, a centre-drawn accent underline, an optional tinting leading icon, and typed feedback — an error string shakes the field once, paints a live-announced red hint and sets aria-invalid, while success draws a check tick; controlled or uncontrolled with real label/id/aria-describedby wiring. Under prefers-reduced-motion every transition collapses to an instant, legible state (no shake, draw, or float tween) and the focus ring uses :focus-visible.
